ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD CISCO SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1068.01E. 2. TO ADD CHARLES INDUSTRY SED AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1074.01E. 3. TO ADD REMOVE SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1075.01S. 4. TO ADD LOGRHYTHM SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1060.01E. 5. TO ADD HEWLITT-PACKARD SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1064.03E. 6. TO ADD CSDS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1069.01E. 7. TO ADD CISCO SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1086.01E.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS224) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD CISCO SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1078.01E. 2. TO REVISE SED PART DESCRIPITION AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1076.01S. 3. TO ADD CISCO SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1073.02E. 4. TO REDUCE PRICE FOR MNS FEATURE CLINS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1066.02P. 5. TO ADD CISCO SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1081.01E. 6. TO ADD UNIPOWER SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1083.01E. 7. TO ADD RIVERBED TECHNOLOGY SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1082.01E. 8. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 9. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS225) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD TWO (2) PATTON SEDS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1087.01E.
2. TO ADD THREE (3) TRIPP-LITE SEDS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1089.01E.
3. TO ADD TWO (2) RAD DATA COMMUNICATIONS SEDS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1090.01E.
4. TO ADD ONE (1) JUNIPER NETWORKS SED UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1091.01E.
5. TO REDUCE PRICE ON ONE (1) TIBCO SED UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1092.01P.
6. TO ADD SIX (6) F5 NETWORKS SED UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1095.01E.
7. TO ADD FORTINET SED CLASS 47 AND REMOVE FORTINET SED DEVICE CLASSES 15 AND 18 UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1096.01P.
8. TO ADD ONE (1) CISCO SED UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1097.01E.
9. TO ADD TWO (2) TIBCO SED UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1098.01E.
10. TO ADD ONE (1) BLUE COAT SED UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1102.01E.
11. TO ADD TWO (2) EMC SED UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1103.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD MNS PRICING AS DESCRIBED IN AE1062.01E. 2. TO ADD ACCESS SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS AS DESCRIBED IN AE1079.01E. 3. TO ADD APPENDIX B INSTRUCTIONS, AS DESCRIBED IN AE1080.01S. 4. TO UPDATE SWC TABLES, AS DESCRIBED IN AE1088.01S. 5. TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN AE1104.01E. 6. TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN AE1107.01E.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS227) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD NEW WIRELINE ACCESS ARRANGEMENT FOR NEW LOCAL EXCHANGE CARRIER SWITCH AND TWO ACCESS SERVICE SPEEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1077.01E. 2. TO ADD MANAGED NETWORK SERVICE INDIVIDUAL COST BASE CLIN, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1084.01E. 3. TO ADD 1 NEW RED HAT SED, DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1105.01E. 4. TO ADD 3 NEW CISCO SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1108.01E. 5. TO ADD AN EXISTING BUNDLED CHARLES INDUSTRIES SED AS A STANDALONE SED UNDER THE NETWORX UNIVERSAL CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1112.01E. 6. TO ADD 2 NEW FORTINET SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1110.02E. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC. 8. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. ADDITION OF NBIP-VPNS WIRELINE SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1093.02E. 2. ADDITION OF NBIP-VPNS WIRELINE SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1120.01E. 5. ADDITION OF NBIP-VPNS WIRELINE SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1094.01E. 6. ADDITION OF MNS WIRELINE SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1123.01E. 7. ADDITION OF MNC-CCS PVC CLINS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1101.01E. 8. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS230) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REVISE BACKGROUND INVESTIGATION LANGUAGE IN SECTION C OF THE CONTRACT. 2. THE CONTRACT IS MODIFIED AS FOLLOWS: SECTION C. THIS SECTION IS MODIFIED TO REMOVE THE REQUIREMENT FOR THE CONTRACTOR TO PAY FOR ALL BACKGROUND INVESTIGATIONS. THE DETERMINATION AS TO WHICH PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PAY FOR THE BACKGROUND INVESTIGATIONS SHALL BE BASED ON EACH AGENCY'S INTERNAL POLICY. THIS INCLUDES CHANGES TO THE FOLLOWING PARAGRAPHS: - SECTION C.3.3.2.2.8 STEP 8 - PERSONNEL SECURITY - SECTION C.3.9.5.7 STEP 4 - PERSONNEL SECURITY / SUITABILITY - SECTION C.3.9.5.8 STEP 5 - PERSONNEL BACKGROUND INVESTIGATION REQUIREMENTS 3. THE ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT REMAINS UNCHANGED. 4. EXCEPT AS PROVIDED HEREIN, ALL PRICES, TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CONTRACT REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS AS DESCRIBED IN AE1135.01E.
